income-tax-filing.label: What type of taxpayer are you (salaried, freelancer, etc.)?
For which financial year do you want to file ITR?
What are your income sources (salary, business, capital gains, etc.)?
Do you have Form 16 or income documents ready (Yes/No)?
Do you want to claim deductions (80C, 80D, etc.) (Yes/No + brief)?
Have you filed ITR for previous years (Yes/No)?

business-tax-filing.label: For which financial year is filing required?
Do you maintain books of accounts (Yes/No)?
Have you filed business ITR previously (Yes/No)?

company-itr-filing.label: For which financial year is ITR filing required?
Is audit completed and report available (Yes/No)?
Have previous year returns been filed (Yes/No)?
Are there any pending compliances or notices (Yes/No + brief)?

tds-return-filing.label: Which TDS return type (24Q, 26Q, etc.) is required?
For which quarter is the TDS return to be filed?
Have TDS deductions been made and data prepared (Yes/No)?
Have previous TDS returns been filed (Yes/No)?
Is there any delay or penalty applicable (Yes/No/Not sure)?

income-tax-notice-handling.label: Under which section is the notice issued (if known)?
What is the date of the notice?
What is the response deadline mentioned?
Do you have supporting documents ready (Yes/No)?
Have you already responded to this notice (Yes/No)?

revised-itr-return.label: For which financial year do you want to revise ITR?
Why do you want to revise the return (brief)?
Was the original ITR already filed (Yes/No)?
Are you within the allowed time limit for revision (Yes/No/Not sure)?

15ca-15cb-filing.label: Who is making the foreign remittance (name/entity type)?
What is the amount being remitted (approximate)?
What is the purpose of remittance (services, royalty, etc.)?
Which country is the payment being sent to?
Do you know if Form 15CB (CA certificate) is required (Yes/No/Not sure)?
Do you have invoice/agreement for the remittance (Yes/No)?
